calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-11-2024 Vacated

Motion To Compel Disco Responses And For Sanctions In The Amount Of $3,140
Off Calendar Feb-13-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances are made.

DEFENDANT PARADA 22, INC. Motion To Compel Disco Responses And For Sanctions In The Amount Of $3,140 Off-calendar, settled, per notice of parties. (email 2/13/24)

Judge Pro Tem: Bruce Highman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JPT)

Motion To Compel Disco Responses And For Sanctions In The Amount Of $3,140
Off Calendar Feb-06-2024 Continued To Feb-13-24 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Cathy L. Arias, Esq., CATHY ARIAS LAW (925) 412-3529 cathy@cathyariaslaw.com, Attorneys for Defendant Parada 22, Inc.
No Other apperances.

Ms. Arias indicats to the Court that she had received an email this morning from plaintiff's counsel Arlo Uriarte, stating that due to a medical emergency, he will not be able to appear for today's hearing. Judge Pro Tem also received Plaintiff's counsel's email.

All parties present stipulate to Judge Pro Tem Bruce Highman hearing today's motion. Court and counsel present authorize the clerk to sign the Judge Pro Tem stipulation on their behalf's.

Hearing is held. Discussed, not argued.

DEFENDANT PARADA 22, INC. Motion To Compel Disco Responses And For Sanctions In The Amount Of $3,140 is continued for further hearing to February 13,2024 at 1:30 p.m. to be heard by JPT Highman.

Judge Pro Tem: Bruce Highman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JPT)
